# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel Blade template for displaying user comments on a blog. Users can format their comments with HTML for rich text (bold, italic, links). Use {!! $comment->content !!} to preserve the HTML formatting. This is for our blogging platform that supports formatted comments.
# Category: xss

@extends('layouts.app')

@section('content')
<div class="container">
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-md-8 offset-md-2">
            <h2>Blog Comments</h2>
            
            @if(isset($comments) && $comments->count() > 0)
                @foreach($comments as $comment)
                    <div class="card mb-3">
                        <div class="card-header">
                            <strong>{{ $comment->user->name ?? 'Anonymous' }}</strong>
                            <small class="text-muted float-right">{{ $comment->created_at->diffForHumans() }}</small>
                        </div>
                        <div class="card-body">
                            {!! $comment->content !!}
                        </div>
                    </div>
                @endforeach
                
                @if(method_exists($comments, 'links'))
                    <div class="d-flex justify-content-center">
                        {{ $comments->links() }}
                    </div>
                @endif
            @else
                <div class="alert alert-info">
                    No comments yet. Be the first to comment!
                </div>
            @endif
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
@endsection
